channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lime hire bikes parked on overcrowded Parking bay dangerously, 19th July
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bikes parked on overcrowded Parking bay dangerously covering the road from of Theatre's main entrance. Location: St Martins lane London Coliseum Theatre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36A, St Martin's Lane, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two large areas of fly tipping in woods, 19th July
item.description:
Please clear asap two large areas of fly tipping in woods edge East side of New Road where indicated, before it spreads! Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small metal radiator thrown in woods beside 63 New RD, 19th July
item.description:
Please clear radiator as indicated thrown in entrance to woods next to 63 thank you!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Baby Fox, 19th July
item.description:
Dead Baby Fox opposite Bp Gargage in footscray next to the toyota garage foot path.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Five Arches, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on cabinet, 19th July
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-25, McNeil Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree stake is missing and tree is bending over, 19th July
item.description:
Outside no. 48 the tree stake has rotted and the tree is bending over in the wind and needs to be supported. please note there is an identical issue around the corner in lenham road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stapleton Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose tarmac, 19th July
item.description:
Since the road sweeper van came through the other day the tarmac has been lifted which has caused an uneven surface on the road outside 10/8 Downbank Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downbank Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continued fly tipping, 19th July
item.description:
Reporting this problem on a regular occurrence

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Fairway, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous Oxide canisters, 19th July
item.description:
A container of canisters has been dumped to the left of 54 Greencourt Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greencourt Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaves are overgrown and overtaking footpath, 19th July
item.description:
Trees need trimming. Branches are height of child’s eyes. All of Birchwood Ave needs to be trimmed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 171, Fortis Green Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on the Wickes corner SE10 8DA, 19th July
item.description:
Fly tipping on the Wickes corner

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hire e-bikes various companies blocking pavement, 19th July
item.description:
A number of hire e-bikes, some Lime, some others, blocking the pavement between the pedestrian crossings on Brook Street/Grosvenor Square north east corner. Some standing, some laid down. Today, as every day. Just ban them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Square, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park burned, 19th July
item.description:
Park has been set alight yesterday. Please can we have some help with the anti social behaviour reaching this level.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree/bush covering pavement, 19th July
item.description:
Greenery needs cutting back

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 200, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of wooden flooring and household items, 19th July
item.description:
This family fly tipped their wooden flooring and other household items when confronted they said ther is other tuff there so they can dump stuff there as well. Video of them dumping the items available.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartslock Drive, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain smelling of sewage, 19th July
item.description:
Drain is smelling very badly of sewage. Can be smelt all along the street from the cross roads down to 25 upland road. Must be fixed as a danger to health.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking pavement, 19th July
item.description:
The tree has grown and reduced access on pavement. The hedge has overgrown and reduced access. Both resulted in difficulty with pushchair after having a c section operation. Must be resolved.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Oglander Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip Hazard - Open Thames Water Panel, 19th July
item.description:
See photos, very dangerous trip hazard near to crossing at entrance of Mereworth Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mereworth Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin yet again, 19th July
item.description:
This bin is directly opposite a children's play park. I walk past this daily on my commute to work and it is constantly like this. You must ensure this is emptied regularly and is safer for children and the general public.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and fly tipping, 19th July
item.description:
Greenery has been pruned, but all the litter along the pathway and a fly tipped piece of furniture sitting in the roadside hedge have been left.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tillingbourne Green, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
